case_title: ERIK T PETERSON VS. JARED MORALES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETERSON, ERIK T AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, JARED AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JM ENTERPRISES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERSON, ERIK T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, JARED AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JM ENTERPRISES $3,049.80 PRINCIPAL, $11.59 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,241.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
